primary_diagnosis:
Multiple myeloma, type IgA lambda, ID 01/2025
Treatment indication: Light chain ratio >100, Osteolytic lesions, Anemia
question: Presentation per SOP. Recommended management?
tumor_board_decision:
We recommend a repeat high-dose chemotherapy and autologous blood stem cell
transplantation as a tandem transplantation.
raw_vignette:
Age: 62
ECOG: 0
Primary diagnosis:
Multiple myeloma, type IgA lambda, ID 01/2025
Treatment indication: Light chain ratio >100, Osteolytic lesions, Anemia
Secondary diagnoses / Comorbidities:
Drug allergies: none
Tobacco use 20 pyrs
Prognostic factors:
Initial with MM (12/2024):
ss2MG 7,8 mg/l, Albumin 21 g/l, LDH 142 U/l, ISS III, R2 ISS VI (high)
Cytogenetics: Deletion 17p13 (42% of cells) as well as IgH rearrangement (82%) as
translocation t(4;14) (85%). High-risk cytogenetics.
Molecular genetics: no mutations in CKN2C, FAF2, TP53 genes
Treatment and course:
Question for the tumor board:
Presentation per SOP. Recommended management?
Tumor board decision:
We recommend a repeat high-dose chemotherapy and autologous blood stem cell
transplantation as a tandem transplantation.
